series_metadata.series_description: Files contain Articles of Incorporation and Code of Regulations, statutory examination report, and other financial information and correspondence relating to a particular credit union.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility six (6) years following liquidation ; Electronic: electronic files six (6) years following liquidation
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
